title: The Best ChatGPT Alternative That Actually Runs on Your Machine
description: ChatGPT is powerful, but it's a rented subscription that runs on someone else's servers. Here's an honest look at what a local, one-time-purchase alternative actually gets you — and where it still falls short.

title: ChatGPT and Compliance: The Fine Print Most Businesses Never Read
description: If you're pasting client, patient, or financial data into ChatGPT, there's fine print worth reading first — what's actually covered, what isn't, and what running locally does and doesn't solve.
